channel.title: Eliot Maurice
channel.description: Eliot Maurice (eltmrc). Builder in Paris. Co-founder of Cial and ClinicPilot, creator of OpenCial. Notes and articles on AI, software, and shipping products.

item.title: Why we're building Cial
item.description: From early Copilot to a self-editing AI workspace. The real story of Cial — Enzo, ClinicPilot, the Station F commute, and why it had to be open source.

item.title: How did we get here?
item.description: Legos I couldn't afford, a game with no save button, and one line in Blocks.java. How I got into building things — year by year.
